title: Bathysa australis
taxonomy: Bathysa australis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Bathysa and is native to South America. The family Rubiaceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The classification of Bathysa australis is further supported by molecular phylogenetic studies.
